gpt_comment: [PARTIAL] Agreement with Meteoblue on temperature but not on precipitation. Meteoblue: 0-0.1" rain not stated when, vs. baseline 3% rain. Looks like you'll need a bumblebee's precision to dodge those raindrops in Brussels today.
